description: Layer 1 ASR and Layer 2 clinical scoring config per prompt

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: Voicing contrast /p/ vs /b/ at word onset
data.layer2_method: Wav2Vec2 forced alignment vs target phoneme sequence
data.layer2_pass_threshold: both onsets correctly classified with confidence >= 0.80
data.layer2_fail_condition: voicing confusion: /p/ produced as /b/ or vice versa

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer1_what: Both words 'vine' and 'wine' detected in transcript
data.layer2_what: /v/ on 'vine' and /w/ on 'wine' in sentence context
data.layer2_method: Wav2Vec2 forced alignment on target words within sentences
data.layer2_pass_threshold: both target word onsets correct with confidence >= 0.78
data.layer2_fail_condition: /v/ and /w/ confused on either word

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: /θ/ on theta-words and /f/ on f-words — no cross-substitution
data.layer2_method: Wav2Vec2 forced alignment on all 7 target words
data.layer2_pass_threshold: all 7 target phonemes correct with confidence >= 0.78
data.layer2_fail_condition: any /θ/→/f/ or /f/→/θ/ substitution

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: /m/ onset on all three + distinct vowels + final consonants
data.layer2_method: Wav2Vec2 forced alignment on all 3 words
data.layer2_pass_threshold: /m/ onset confidence >= 0.80 on all 3; vowel distinctiveness confirmed
data.layer2_fail_condition: any /n/ or /b/ substitution at onset; any vowel collapse

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: /st/ and /str/ clusters fully produced — no reduction to single consonant
data.layer2_method: Wav2Vec2 cluster detection on word onset segment
data.layer2_pass_threshold: both consonants in each cluster detected with confidence >= 0.78
data.layer2_fail_condition: cluster reduced to single consonant on any word (e.g. 'torm' or 'trong')

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: /θr/ cluster at onset of all three words — tongue between teeth then /r/
data.layer2_method: Wav2Vec2 forced alignment on onset cluster of each word
data.layer2_pass_threshold: both /θ/ and /r/ detected in onset cluster, confidence >= 0.78 each
data.layer2_fail_condition: any substitution: /dr/, /fr/, or /tr/ used instead of /θr/

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer1_method: ASR word match vs reference_text forced alignment
data.layer2_what: 'appointment' and 'Thursday' clearly produced with target phonemes
data.layer2_method: Wav2Vec2 forced alignment on highlighted words only
data.layer2_pass_threshold: both highlighted words fully intelligible at natural rate
data.layer2_fail_condition: 'Thursday' with /d/ instead of /θ/, or 'appointment' with syllable omission

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer1_what: >=90% of 10 words detected at both rates
data.layer1_method: Two separate ASR runs (slow + normal recording)
data.layer2_what: 'carefully', 'fragile', 'documents' fully produced at normal rate
data.layer2_method: Wav2Vec2 alignment on highlighted words at natural rate recording
data.layer2_pass_threshold: all syllables present on all 3 highlighted words at normal rate
data.layer2_fail_condition: syllable dropped at normal rate that was present at slow rate

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer1_what: >=85% words detected across all 3 speed readings
data.layer2_what: 'statistician' and 'preliminary' fully produced at all 3 speeds
data.layer2_method: Wav2Vec2 syllable count on both highlighted words at each speed
data.layer2_pass_threshold: 5 syllables detected on each word at each speed
data.layer2_fail_condition: syllable count drops at fast rate for either word

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer1_method: ASR word match vs reference text
data.layer2_what: Voice amplitude steady; no breaks; final words fully audible
data.layer2_method: Amplitude analysis on audio waveform + ASR confidence on final 5 words
data.layer2_pass_threshold: amplitude variance <= 15% across sentence; all final 3 words in transcript
data.layer2_fail_condition: amplitude drop > 30% in second half OR voice break detected OR final words absent

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: 'technology', 'significant', 'challenges' fully produced + voice varied
data.layer2_method: Wav2Vec2 syllable check on 3 highlighted words + pitch analysis
data.layer2_pass_threshold: all syllables present on all 3 + pitch range > 5 semitones across paragraph
data.layer2_fail_condition: syllable dropped on any highlighted word OR pitch completely flat

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: Contrastive stress audible on NOT, remarkable, unprecedented
data.layer2_method: Prosody analysis: pitch and duration increase on target words vs surrounding words
data.layer2_pass_threshold: each target word shows pitch/duration > 1.4x surrounding word average
data.layer2_fail_condition: no audible stress difference between target and non-target words

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: Natural phrase stress — content words louder than function words
data.layer2_method: Amplitude and duration analysis per word; content vs function word comparison
data.layer2_pass_threshold: stressed words have average amplitude/duration > 1.3x reduced words
data.layer2_fail_condition: flat delivery — all words at equal amplitude or function words as loud as content words

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: Correct stress on 're-CORD-breaking' and 'per-FORM-ance'
data.layer2_method: Prosody stress detection on both target words
data.layer2_pass_threshold: correct syllable receives highest amplitude/duration in each word
data.layer2_fail_condition: wrong syllable stressed on either target word

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_method: Prosody stress detection on each of 4 target words
data.layer2_pass_threshold: correct syllable is primary stress in all 4 words with confidence >= 0.78
data.layer2_fail_condition: 2 or more words have stress on wrong syllable

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_fail_condition: any /r/, /w/, or /j/ substitution at onset

data.layer2_pass_threshold: /θ/ detected on all 8 with confidence >= 0.78

data.layer2_method: Wav2Vec2 forced alignment on all 9 target words in connected speech recording

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_pass_threshold: word accuracy >= 95% at natural rate (same as slow version)

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_pass_threshold: syllable count = 5 for both words at all 3 speeds
data.layer2_fail_condition: syllable count drops below 4 on either word at normal or fast speed

data.layer1_pass: all 19 words including the number sequence

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: Breath only between the two sentences — none within either
data.layer2_method: Breath detection analysis: one breath gap between sentences; none within
data.layer2_pass_threshold: single breath gap located between sentence 1 and sentence 2; no gap within either sentence
data.layer2_fail_condition: breath gap detected within sentence 1 or sentence 2

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: Breaths only at natural phrase boundaries — never mid-phrase
data.layer2_method: Breath detection aligned with syntactic boundary detection
data.layer2_pass_threshold: all breath events co-occur with phrase boundary; no mid-phrase breath
data.layer2_fail_condition: more than 2 breath events at non-boundary positions

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: Pauses at both full stops; no extra pauses within sentences
data.layer2_method: Pause detection analysis: timestamp gaps vs sentence boundary positions
data.layer2_pass_threshold: pause duration 0.3–0.8s at each full stop; no gap > 0.3s mid-sentence
data.layer2_fail_condition: gap > 0.4s detected mid-sentence OR no pause detected at full stops

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: Zero filler words in the output
data.layer2_method: ASR transcript filler word detection: um, uh, er, like, you know
data.layer2_pass_threshold: 0 filler words detected in transcript
data.layer2_fail_condition: 2 or more filler words detected

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: At least 3 deliberate pauses of 0.5–1.2s before key points
data.layer2_method: Pause detection: count pauses in 0.5–1.2s range that precede stressed content words
data.layer2_pass_threshold: 3 or more deliberate pauses correctly positioned before key content
data.layer2_fail_condition: fewer than 2 qualifying pauses OR all pauses < 0.3s (rushing)

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: Falling pitch on final word 'three' — statement sounds definitive
data.layer2_method: Pitch contour analysis on final word — direction and degree of fall
data.layer2_pass_threshold: pitch drops at least 10 semitones on final word
data.layer2_fail_condition: pitch rises or stays flat on final word (sounds like a question)

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: High pitch rise on 'day' conveying genuine surprise
data.layer2_method: Pitch analysis on final word: height and steepness of rise
data.layer2_pass_threshold: pitch rises to top 25% of speaker's range on 'day'
data.layer2_fail_condition: pitch rise < 5 semitones on 'day' (sounds neutral, not surprised)

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: Stress on 'SHE' in sentence 1 and 'NEVER' in sentence 2
data.layer2_method: Prosody analysis: stressed word identified in each sentence
data.layer2_pass_threshold: highest stressed word = SHE in sentence 1 and NEVER in sentence 2
data.layer2_fail_condition: same word stressed in both OR stress on irrelevant word

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_method: Emotion recognition model + prosody features (rate, pitch range, amplitude)
data.layer2_pass_threshold: emotion model detects positive/empathetic valence > 0.60; rate < 140 WPM
data.layer2_fail_condition: emotion model detects neutral or hurried delivery; rate > 160 WPM

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only. Not used for adaptive difficulty.

data.layer2_what: Three distinct emotional sections: calm → confident → warm
data.layer2_method: Emotion model run on 3 equal segments of the recording; pitch and energy per segment
data.layer2_pass_threshold: segment 1 = calm (low energy, mid pitch); segment 2 = confident (higher energy, wide pitch); segment 3 = warm (settling pitch, positive valence)
data.layer2_fail_condition: all 3 segments classified as same emotion or energy flat throughout

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: WPM in 75–105 range; all words intelligible
data.layer2_method: WPM calculation from timestamps + word accuracy check

data.layer2_fail_condition: WPM outside 65–115 range OR word accuracy drops

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: WPM 110–150; all words intelligible at professional rate
data.layer2_method: WPM + word accuracy
data.layer2_pass_threshold: WPM 110–150; word accuracy >= 92%
data.layer2_fail_condition: WPM outside 95–165 OR word accuracy < 88%

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: WPM sustained at 140–160 across full 60 seconds
data.layer2_method: WPM calculation per 10-second window across recording

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: Natural connected speech — flap /t/ and linking between words

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_fail_condition: referral not explicitly requested OR symptom unclear

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: Polite phrase + clear correction + restatement all present
data.layer2_method: Keyword detection for polite openers + content of restatement
data.layer2_pass_threshold: polite opener present; original point restated clearly
data.layer2_fail_condition: no polite opener OR restatement unclear or absent

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: Same meaning in more formal register
data.layer2_method: Register classifier + semantic similarity to original
data.layer2_pass_threshold: register elevated to professional; semantic similarity > 0.75
data.layer2_fail_condition: same informal register OR meaning changed

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: Formal professional register with same meaning
data.layer2_method: Register classifier + semantic similarity
data.layer2_pass_threshold: register = formal; similarity > 0.70
data.layer2_fail_condition: informal words like 'boss' or 'pay' retained

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: Each version simpler than previous; third version universally clear
data.layer2_method: Register classifier run on each version; complexity score comparison
data.layer2_pass_threshold: complexity score decreases across 3 versions; third version at basic register
data.layer2_fail_condition: complexity scores flat or increasing OR third version still complex

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: Season + 2 distinct reasons within time limit
data.layer2_method: Topic detection for season + 2 reason clauses
data.layer2_pass_threshold: season identified; 2 reasons detected; under 30 seconds
data.layer2_fail_condition: fewer than 2 reasons OR significantly over time

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: 3+ sequencing words; process in logical order
data.layer2_method: Sequencing word detection in transcript + logical order check
data.layer2_pass_threshold: 3+ sequencing words detected; process steps in correct sequence
data.layer2_fail_condition: fewer than 2 sequencing words OR steps out of logical order

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: Structured solution + direct Q&A response
data.layer2_method: Topic structure detection + Q&A directness analysis
data.layer2_pass_threshold: solution has structure; Q&A answer directly addresses question
data.layer2_fail_condition: solution lacks structure OR Q&A answer evasive/unclear

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: 3 practical, logically ordered steps
data.layer2_method: Step count + logical coherence analysis
data.layer2_pass_threshold: 3+ practical steps in logical order
data.layer2_fail_condition: fewer than 3 steps OR steps illogical

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: 4 steps with explicit ethical reasoning
data.layer2_method: Step count + ethical language detection (return/police/owner)
data.layer2_pass_threshold: 4+ steps; ethical language present; logical decision-making
data.layer2_fail_condition: fewer than 4 steps OR unethical outcome suggested

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: 4+ steps with diplomatic language throughout
data.layer2_method: Step count + diplomacy language detection
data.layer2_pass_threshold: 4+ steps; diplomatic vocabulary detected (discuss, understand, together, resolution)
data.layer2_fail_condition: aggressive language detected OR fewer than 3 steps

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: Clear agree/disagree + logical supporting reason
data.layer2_method: Sentiment polarity detection + reason clause detection
data.layer2_pass_threshold: clear agree/disagree detected; reason clause present and logical
data.layer2_fail_condition: no clear position OR no reason given

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: Both sides approximately equal; transition phrase used
data.layer2_method: Argument side detection + transition keyword + time balance
data.layer2_pass_threshold: each side 25–40 seconds; transition phrase detected
data.layer2_fail_condition: one side > 45 seconds OR no transition phrase

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: Structured evidence-based 2-minute argument against the position
data.layer2_method: Structure detection + evidence language detection + argument coherence
data.layer2_pass_threshold: 2+ distinct arguments with evidence/examples; coherent throughout
data.layer2_fail_condition: single repeated point OR no evidence/examples OR incoherent

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: Best part stated + complete because-clause
data.layer2_method: Keyword detection for 'best part' reference + because-clause detection
data.layer2_pass_threshold: best part identified; because clause grammatically complete
data.layer2_fail_condition: no because clause OR sentence incomplete

data.note: Warmup — attempt detection only.

data.layer2_what: Who, topic, and outcome all clearly stated
data.layer2_method: Named entity detection (who) + topic detection + outcome detection
data.layer2_pass_threshold: all 3 elements identifiable in transcript
data.layer2_fail_condition: any of the 3 elements absent or unclear

data.layer1_what: Diary + evaluation both detected in transcript
data.layer1_pass: both diary and evaluation sections present
data.layer2_what: One specific strength + one specific improvement area identified
data.layer2_method: Positive self-assessment keyword + improvement area keyword detection
data.layer2_pass_threshold: both specific and identifiable; not generic (e.g. not just 'I was good')
data.layer2_fail_condition: evaluation absent OR both vague/generic
